goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'rosa's bed and breakfast'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
